# zennode-derive public API surface
# Generated by zennode/tests/public_api_doc.rs via `cargo public-api --simplified`
# (regenerated on every `cargo test`; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Underscore-prefixed features are internal and excluded from the
# all-features section.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes together with the code.

## default features (3 items)

pub mod zennode_derive
pub proc macro zennode_derive::#[derive(Node)]
pub proc macro zennode_derive::#[derive(NodeEnum)]

pub mod zennode_derive
pub proc macro zennode_derive::#[derive(Node)]
pub proc macro zennode_derive::#[derive(NodeEnum)]
